raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "The risk of devastating wildfires is high in January as well as in June.",
    "A year-round force can perform many preventative measures to limit and mitigate fire risk.",
    "The state does not provide enough funding to CAL FIRE to have full staffing during winter months despite increasing fire risk in all seasons.",
    "CAL FIRE has more than 350 fully staffed fire engines during the summer months, but winter layoffs reduce engine availability by nearly 200 due to a lack of personnel.",
    "The frequency of fires in California has increased, with over 450,000 incidents reported in 2015 and nearly 600,000 in 2023, indicating a thirty percent increase over eight years.",
    "The majority of the twenty largest and most destructive wildfires in California history have occurred in just the last ten years."
  ]
}
```
